case_title: MIGUEL GONZALEZ VS. GENERAL MOTORS LLC, ET AL

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100186636) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, MIGUEL AN INDIVIDUAL AS TO DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIAIBLITY COMPANY DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-07-2023 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-06-2023 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-15-2023
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS (TRANSACTION ID # 210070034) FILED BY ATTORNEY JACOBSON, KEVIN Y

MASTER JURY TRIAL CALENDAR SET FOR MAY-20-2024 - JONATHAN SHUGART, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS LLC. NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF. THE COURT RECEIVED A PHONE CALL THIS MORNING THAT PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY'S FLIGHT WAS CANCELLED. THE COURT CONTINUED THE MATTER TO TOMORROW, MAY-21-2024 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206 FOR TRIAL CALL. PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY TO FILE A DECLARATION WITH THE AIRLINE, FLIGHT NUMBER AND AIRPORT. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL WAIVED NOTICE. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206)

REMOVED FROM MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR MAY-21-2024 - ***CASE IS DISMISSED*** HARRY TERZIAN, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF MIGUEL GONZALEZ. JONATHAN SHUGART, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS LLC. THE COURT DENIED PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL'S REQUEST FOR A BRIEF CONTINUANCE OF THE TRIAL DATE. THE COURT DISMISSED THE CASE WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206)
